entities.name: SOIL PH
entities.description: The acidity or alkalinity of the soil, which is the primary characteristic being estimated in the study

entities.name: GOOGLE EARTH ENGINE
entities.description: A cloud-based platform used for the remote estimation of soil characteristics using satellite data

entities.name: SENTINEL-1
entities.description: A satellite mission providing data used to generate indices for soil pH estimation

entities.name: SENTINEL-2
entities.description: A satellite mission providing data used to generate indices for soil pH estimation

entities.name: LANDSAT-8
entities.description: A satellite mission providing data used to generate indices for soil pH estimation

entities.name: STEP-WISE MULTIPLE REGRESSION
entities.description: A statistical model used to develop predictive models for soil pH and select independent variables

entities.name: ARTIFICIAL NEURAL NETWORKS
entities.description: A machine learning model used to develop predictive models for soil pH

entities.name: RANDOM FOREST REGRESSION
entities.description: A machine learning ensemble model that performed best in predicting soil pH

entities.name: SATELLITE-DERIVED INDICES
entities.description: Spectral bands and indices from satellites used as proxies to estimate soil pH

entities.name: ANGUL
entities.description: A district in Odisha State used as a case study area for soil pH detection

entities.name: BALANGIR
entities.description: A district in Odisha State used as a case study area for soil pH detection

entities.name: ODISHA STATE
entities.description: The state in India where the study was conducted

entities.name: ACIDIC SOILS
entities.description: Soils with low pH levels, comprising more than 70% of the soils in the study area

entities.name: NEUTRAL SOILS
entities.description: Soils with a pH level around 7

entities.name: BIG DATA ANALYTICS
entities.description: The approach of using large-scale data to predict soil pH and create accurate soil maps
